name: markdown-link-validity
question: Do all internal markdown links in tracked documentation files resolve to existing targets?

broken.source: string (path to markdown file containing the broken link)
broken.link: string (the link destination as written, including any anchor)
broken.resolved_path: string (the absolute-from-repo-root path the link was checked against)

fallback: Manually grep markdown files for links of the form [text](path), filter out http/https/mailto/tel and bare anchors, then test each resolved path with test -f or Test-Path. Slow and error-prone vs. the oracle.

provenance.note: Starter Verification Oracle for the Verification Oracle category. Dogfoods the category by validating ULDF's own internal documentation links.

config.comment: Edit scan_directories or scan_root_files to change scope. Avoid adding huge directories: this oracle has a <2s speed contract.
